summary: Comprehensive testing of Celebration Wall section on /celebrate-soul. Backend: 15/15 tests passing. Frontend: ~90% passing. 2 bugs found — Step 3 confirmation never shown (medium) and wall-card-undefined testids due to broken MongoDB ID projection (minor).

minor.issue: MongoDB projection `{"_id": 0, "id": {"$toString": "$_id"}}` is invalid in regular find() — aggregation operators can't be used in standard projections. As a result, photos returned have no `id` field. Fix: use aggregation pipeline with $project and $toString, or map IDs server-side in Python.

Like toggle searches `{'id': photo_id}` but DB photos don't have an 'id' field (only '_id'). So likes are never actually persisted for DB photos. The frontend optimistically shows +1 but DB count is unchanged. Fix: `find_one({'_id': ObjectId(photo_id)})`

ui_bugs.issue: Confirmation screen '🎉 Your story is on the wall ♥' is NEVER shown to user. The modal closes before step 3 renders. Root cause: `onSubmitted()` sets `uploadModalOpen=false` in the parent, and React batches this with `setStep(3)` from the modal's finally block. Since `isOpen=false` triggers `return null`, step 3 never renders. Fix: Move `setStep(3)` before calling `onSubmitted()`, or only call `onSubmitted()` from the 'See your photo →' button click in step 3.

All DB photo cards render `data-testid="wall-card-undefined"` and `data-testid="wall-like-undefined"` because photos from the API have no `id` field (broken backend projection). Causes React key warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' from CelebrationMemoryWall. Fix: Fix backend to return `id` field OR map `_id` in frontend formatter.

issues: All cards show '2 days ago' because DB photos were recently created. This is correct behavior of formatTimeAgo() — not a bug, but worth noting that the seeded DB photos don't preserve the original dates (Last week, 5 days ago etc from DEFAULT_PHOTOS).

features_verified.subtitle_no_login: ✓ 'Real moments of joy from our pet parent community 💕' — shown when no pet
features_verified.upload_card_first: ✓ 'Share Your Story' title + '✦ Add Photo' button — card is first in scroll row
features_verified.real_photos: ✓ Euro (Mumbai ♥234), Simba (Bangalore ♥389), Zippy (Delhi ♥312) — real photos displayed
features_verified.timestamps: ✓ No 'Recently' found — all timestamps use relative format ('2 days ago')
features_verified.heart_counts: ✓ 234, 389, 312 shown correctly on Euro, Simba, Zippy
features_verified.heart_button_animation: ✓ Heart fills pink (♥, rgb(233,30,140)) after click; count increments +1
features_verified.frosted_glass_tag: ✓ 'Birthday' frosted glass tag at bottom-left of each photo image
features_verified.share_btn_opens_modal: ✓ '📸 Share Your Story' button opens 3-step upload modal
features_verified.add_photo_opens_modal: ✓ '✦ Add Photo' on upload card also opens modal
features_verified.modal_step1: ✓ Dropzone with 'Drag photo here or tap to choose' + 'Next →' disabled until photo
features_verified.modal_step2: ✓ Caption textarea (140 char limit enforced), chips (Birthday/Gotcha Day/Milestone/Photoshoot/Pawty/Just because), city input, 'Share on the Wall →' button
features_verified.modal_step3: ✗ Confirmation screen '🎉 Your story is on the wall ♥' NOT shown — modal closes before step 3 renders
features_verified.share_btn_after_submit: ✓ Share button changes to '✓ Your story is on the wall' (green, disabled) after submission
features_verified.subtitle_after_submit: ✓ Subtitle updates to 'Your story is on the wall ♥'
features_verified.upload_card_after_submit: ✓ Upload card CTA changes to '✓ Shared'
features_verified.lightbox_content: ✓ Full photo, pet name, city, caption, heart count, 'Love this ♥' button, 'Share this moment' button
features_verified.lightbox_prev_next: ✓ Next arrow navigates to next photo; prev arrow navigates back
features_verified.scroll_arrows: ✓ Left/right scroll arrows navigate the wall (scroll position changed 0→234px)

action_items: BUG FIX (MEDIUM): WallUploadModal step 3 never shows — move setStep(3) call to BEFORE onSubmitted(), not in finally block. Or only call onSubmitted() from the 'See your photo →' button in step 3.

BUG FIX (MINOR): Fix backend GET /api/celebration-wall/photos to return id field. Use aggregation pipeline: `db.celebration_photos.aggregate([{$match: query}, {$addFields: {id: {$toString: '$_id'}}}, {$project: {_id: 0}}])` or map IDs in Python after fetching.
BUG FIX (LOW): Fix like toggle endpoint to use `find_one({'_id': ObjectId(photo_id)})` so like counts persist to DB.
MINOR: CelebrationMemoryWall passes `key={photo.id}` but id is undefined for all DB photos — causes React key warning. Will be fixed once backend returns proper id.
critical_code_review_comments: WallUploadModal.jsx line 63-99: handleSubmit calls onSubmitted() in try block (which closes the modal) and setStep(3) in finally. React batches these updates and since isOpen=false, step 3 never renders. Fix: setStep(3) first, then call onSubmitted() from the confirmation close button.

celebration_wall_routes.py line 91-93: MongoDB find() projection using aggregation operators is invalid. `{'id': {'$toString': '$_id'}}` in a find() projection does not compute $toString. Fix: use aggregate() pipeline or map IDs server-side.
celebration_wall_routes.py line 188: `find_one({'id': photo_id})` — no DB photo has a field named 'id'. Should be `find_one({'_id': ObjectId(photo_id)})`. Likes are never persisted.
CelebrationMemoryWall.jsx: React list key warning because all DB photo IDs are undefined. Will resolve when backend returns proper id field.

success_rate.frontend: 90% (18/20 requirements passing — Step 3 confirmation not shown, testids undefined)

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ UGC photos created during backend testing (in pending_review state, not featured)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Celebration Wall section on /celebrate-soul at scroll y≈3000. Upload card (wall-upload-card) is always first. Real photos (Euro/Simba/Zippy) are rendered from DB (IDs are MongoDB ObjectIds). All wall-card-{id} and wall-like-{id} testids resolve to wall-card-undefined/wall-like-undefined because backend GET projection is broken. The lightbox, heart animation, scroll arrows, and modal steps 1-2 all work correctly. Step 3 confirmation screen has a bug — it never renders. Backend 15/15 passing.

bug1_step3_not_shown.root_cause: WallUploadModal.handleSubmit() calls onSubmitted() in try block (line 91), which triggers setHasSubmitted(true)+setUploadModalOpen(false) in parent CelebrationMemoryWall. setStep(3) is called in finally block (line 98). React 18 batches these concurrent updates. When the component re-renders, isOpen=false causes WallUploadModal to return null before step 3 can render.
bug1_step3_not_shown.fix: Move setStep(3) to before the onSubmitted() call in the try block, then have 'See your photo →' button in step 3 call a new onDone() prop that closes the modal AND calls the parent's onSubmitted handler.

bug2_undefined_testids.root_cause: celebration_wall_routes.py get_celebration_photos() uses invalid MongoDB projection: `{'_id': 0, 'id': {'$toString': '$_id'}}`. In a standard find() query, aggregation expressions like $toString are not evaluated — this just returns a literal dict or is ignored. So photos returned have no 'id' field. Frontend maps p.id || p._id, both undefined.
bug2_undefined_testids.fix: Replace find() with aggregate(): `[{$match: query}, {$sort: {display_order: 1}}, {$limit: limit}, {$addFields: {id: {$toString: '$_id'}}}, {$project: {_id: 0}}]`
